column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Wearing a retro modern kimono with a hakama, smiling" | TEXT="はいからさん" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a retro parasol" | TEXT="モダンですね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Adjusting a large ribbon in hair" | TEXT="どうかしら" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully with leather boots" | TEXT="ハイカラね" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Reading a classic literature book" | TEXT="読書中" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up from a book, surprised" | TEXT="あら" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting in a retro cafe chair" | TEXT="素敵" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Drinking tea from an antique cup" | TEXT="良いお味" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly at the camera" | TEXT="ごきげんよう"
